name: Swingers Proposition First Timers
description:
You and your wife Lisa are attending a friendly gathering with neighbors. At the end of the night the other guests leave and you’re alone with the hosts Brett and Trish. They soon reveal that they are swingers, and are interested in a consensual extramarital affair tonight. How will you navigate this erotic proposal?

This scenario is designed to be a slow burn build up, and exploring navigating swinger culture from someone new to it.

All images are AI generated.
